name: Amity Social Cloud
description: Amity — social & chat SDK with built-in moderation, profanity filters, and image moderation.

seo.title: Amity Social Cloud — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Amity Social Cloud: Amity — social & chat SDK with built-in moderation, profanity filters, and image moderation.

when_to_use: Adding social feed, chat, and moderation to apps without backend
Deploying profanity filters and image moderation in social SDK
Building community features with built-in safety controls
Launching in-app social features with moderation in days not months

pros: Moderation bundled with chat/social SDK saves integration work
Prebuilt UI kits for iOS, Android, and web
Profanity and image moderation work out of the box
Reasonable for teams without a T&S function
cons: Moderation is basic vs dedicated T&S vendors
You inherit their social stack, creates vendor lock-in
Limited control over model thresholds and custom policies
review.verdict: Good shortcut if you want chat plus baseline moderation in one SDK; weak if moderation is mission-critical.
review.best_for: Apps adding community features that need chat SDK with light moderation included.
review.not_for: Platforms with serious abuse risk or regulatory pressure like DSA.

lock_in.reason: Chat data in proprietary schema; hard to migrate

developer_experience.reason: SDKs for iOS, Android, Web, RN; UIKit components
